result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Allrecipes search results page for “caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza,” showing recipe/article cards in a grid.
task_relevant_visible_text:
- Search Results For
- caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza
- ITALIAN
- Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza
- FOOD NEWS AND TRENDS
- We Tried 47 Kroger Store-Brand Products...
selected_candidate:
Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza (left result card)
constraint_evidence:
- recipe/topic is about caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza: supported by search query text visible in search box
- must be on Allrecipes: supported by URL/title and site branding
- more than 40 reviews: not_visible
- rating of at least 4.5 stars: not_visible
- exact recipe match “caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza”: contradicted/uncertain; visible top result is “Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza,” not an exact match
- result is a recipe/article candidate: supported by visible card labeled ITALIAN with food image
action_target:
No clear clickable target for a qualifying recipe is visible; likely need to scroll or search/refine.
success_signals:
A result page or recipe detail page showing a caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza recipe with visible rating >=4.5 and >40 reviews.
failure_signals:
Selecting a non-matching recipe/article; no visible ratings/reviews on current screen; no exact query match shown.
uncertainty:
The top-left card may lead to a recipe that includes caramelized onions/goat cheese, but that is not visible here.

task_context.task: navigate: Explore Allrecipes for a caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza recipe with more than 40 reviews and a rating of at least 4.5 stars.
task_context.title: Allrecipes | Recipes, How-Tos, Videos and More

observation.title: Allrecipes | Recipes, How-Tos, Videos and More

args.query: task ended on Allrecipes search results page without checking rating and review count for query 'caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza'; selected visible result was non-exact match

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

args.expected_behavior: Continue from the Allrecipes search results by identifying a recipe that matches the query and verifying it has more than 40 reviews and a rating of at least 4.5 stars before stopping or reporting success.
args.actual_behavior: The trajectory stopped on an Allrecipes search results page where the visible candidate was 'Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza,' but there is no evidence the agent verified an exact caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza match or checked the required rating/review thresholds; it then sent an exit message.
args.regression_rule: When the task includes explicit rating/review qualifiers, do not stop at the first plausible search result; inspect the candidate recipe or continue refining the search until the exact recipe and thresholds are verified.

evidence.claim: The task required finding a caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza recipe with >40 reviews and rating >=4.5 stars.
The final visible state was an Allrecipes search results page for 'caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza' showing 'Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza' as a candidate.
High-detail evidence says the exact recipe match was uncertain/contradicted and that rating and review count were not visible on the current screen.
The trajectory ended with an exit message instead of further verification.
